instagram.bio:
• Helping business coaches grow Lifestyle Empires
• Clients have made over $1B
• Get my free training on leads, sales and scaling👇🏽

viral_posts.hook: Comment SHOWBIZ to get the deets for the workshop.
viral_posts.caption:
Comment SHOWBIZ to get the deets for the workshop.

Will show you behind the scenes of what @hormozi called the naked funnel and a whole lot more.

Public apology:⁠
⁠
For years, I taught that once your offer went over $2k… you needed a sales call.⁠
⁠
Under $2k? Sure, sell it with a doc, a webinar, whatever.⁠
⁠
Over $2k? “Better get the closers in.”⁠
⁠
Turns out… that was complete rubbish.⁠
⁠
A client of mine had a $30k offer being sold in chat by VAs with their thumbs… while the “real” sales team was busy having feelings about it.⁠
⁠
That was the moment the penny dropped.⁠
⁠
If someone can sell a $30k offer without a call…⁠
⁠
maybe the call wasn’t the magic.⁠
⁠
Maybe the system was broken.⁠
⁠
So we tested it.⁠
⁠
Locked the sales team away.⁠
⁠
No calls.⁠
⁠
No chats.⁠
⁠
No closing.⁠
⁠
Nothing.⁠
⁠
15 months later?⁠
⁠
We’re selling 5x more every month than we did with a full sales team.⁠
⁠
That’s Salesless™.⁠
⁠
Comment SALESLESS for the deets.

You’ve got 3 options:⁠
⁠
Option A: stay in sales call prison forever.⁠
⁠
Option B: hire a team and accidentally become the manager of a sad little call centre.⁠
⁠
Option C: build a Salesless™ system that lets people buy without calls.⁠
⁠
A and B are available.⁠
⁠
C is better.⁠
⁠
Despite what the sales douches say, this works.⁠
⁠
Not just for me.⁠
⁠
For clients too.⁠
⁠
Hundreds of them.⁠
⁠
And yes, one of the guys publicly bagging it had privately asked me to help him fix his mess.⁠
⁠
We built the doc.⁠
⁠
He made 3 x $30k sales in 12 hours.⁠
⁠
Awkward.⁠
⁠
If you want to see how the full system works — doc, demand, deadline — comment SALESLESS.

viral_posts.hook: Comment SHOWBIZ if you want to see how coaches are making big sales from small YouTube cha
viral_posts.caption: Comment SHOWBIZ if you want to see how coaches are making big sales from small YouTube channels.

viral_posts.hook: For years my business was a weird pool.⁠
viral_posts.caption:
For years my business was a weird pool.⁠
⁠
Shallow end: free leads splashing.⁠
Deep end: $30k clients doing laps.⁠
⁠
Nothing in between.⁠
⁠
So I was basically yelling,⁠
“Stop paddling and jump in the deep end.”⁠
⁠
It worked… until it didn’t.⁠
⁠
The fix?⁠
⁠
Deeper water.⁠
But you can still touch the bottom.⁠
⁠
AKA: Paid workshops.⁠
⁠
They get a feel for swimming⁠
without the full send.⁠
⁠
Comment WORKSHOP and I’ll send the details.

viral_posts.hook: There are four types of content:⁠
viral_posts.caption:
There are four types of content:⁠
⁠
1️⃣ Hard to make + doesn’t work⁠
2️⃣ Easy to make + doesn’t work⁠
3️⃣ Works… but it’s a grind⁠
4️⃣ Works AND feels easy⁠
⁠
Guess which one most coaches never find.⁠
⁠
The goal isn’t to post more.⁠
⁠
The goal is to become magnetic.⁠
⁠
I’m running a workshop showing how.⁠
⁠
Comment MAGNETIC and I’ll send you the details.

viral_posts.hook: I put all my skill points into charisma.⁠
viral_posts.caption:
I put all my skill points into charisma.⁠
⁠
Zero left for spreadsheets.⁠
⁠
Somehow… eight figures unlocked.⁠
⁠
Moral of the story: stop trying to be well-rounded.⁠
⁠
Find your one unfair advantage and max it out.⁠
⁠
(Also: hire people who enjoy Excel. I do not.)

viral_posts.hook: The GOAT @caseyneistat told me to delete the YouTube Studio App. I took his advice and end
viral_posts.caption: The GOAT @caseyneistat told me to delete the YouTube Studio App. I took his advice and ended up getting way more clients from YouTube. If you want clients not views comment SHOWBIZ and I’ll send you the workshop deets.

The algorithm rewards average. ⁠
⁠
Buyers don’t.⁠
⁠
This workshop is about creating content with taste, signal, and a point of view — the kind people actually want to follow, binge, and buy from.⁠
⁠
Comment MAGNETIC and stop being average.

viral_posts.hook: They don’t need convincing. They need a clock.⁠
viral_posts.caption:
They don’t need convincing. They need a clock.⁠
⁠
Most people don’t buy because they’re stuck.⁠
⁠
Too many choices.⁠
⁠
No urgency.⁠
⁠
No reason to decide now.⁠
⁠
Add one clear path and one real deadline…⁠
⁠
…and suddenly people move.⁠
⁠
Works for dinner.⁠
⁠
Works for sales.⁠
⁠
Follow for more unhinged parenting and marketing hacks.

Hot take:⁠
⁠
Your best prospects do not want a sales call.⁠
⁠
And honestly… neither do you.⁠
⁠
The old high-ticket playbook said:⁠
⁠
Get them on Zoom.⁠
⁠
Handle objections.⁠
⁠
Close hard.⁠
⁠
Repeat until your soul leaves your body.⁠
⁠
But the market changed.⁠
⁠
The best buyers now are high-agency.⁠
⁠
They know what problem they want solved.⁠
⁠
They know what they’re looking for.⁠
⁠
They do not need a 45-minute ritual to decide.⁠
⁠
They need to see a strong offer.⁠
⁠
Understand the value.⁠
⁠
And make their own mind up.⁠
⁠
That’s why we went Salesless™.⁠
⁠
No calls. No DMs. No sales team.⁠
⁠
And we now sign 5x more clients each month.⁠
⁠
If you want the deets, comment SALESLESS.

viral_posts.hook: You don’t need to be more creative.⁠
viral_posts.caption:
You don’t need to be more creative.⁠
⁠
You just need to notice more.⁠
⁠
The best content isn’t invented — it’s already happening around you.⁠
⁠
Once you train your radar for “interesting,” the whole game gets easier.⁠
⁠
Watch this.⁠
⁠
Then go notice something.⁠
⁠
Follow for more.
